name: Candied Kahlua Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
2. Stir in the pecans and spread out onto a foil-lined baking sheet in a single layer.
3. Bake at 325°F for about 20-25 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
4. Remove from the foil and cool on wax paper.
